title: Missing 10 Market Days Costs You $38,000
hook: Investors who panic and pull out during crashes miss the 10 best days — and that one mistake turns $71,750 into $32,871.
angle: Most people think exiting a dropping market is smart, but the market's biggest recovery days happen inside its worst crashes — making timing catastrophically expensive
audience: Anyone with a 401k, IRA, or investment account who checks their balance during downturns and feels the urge to sell
key_numbers: $10,000 invested in S&P 500 2004-2024 = $71,750 if you stayed in
6 of the 10 best days occur within 2 weeks of the 10 worst days
